findings.comment: The repo-side reader accepts any non-empty schema_version and proceeds to scan/green, so an unsupported future or malformed version (for example "2.0") is silently treated as compatible. This falsifies the authoritative version-locked repo contract and can make changed deny-list semantics false-green. Enforce the supported version (currently 1.0) and add the paired abuse test asserting an unknown version exits 2; keep the separate iteration-004 consumer reader fail-open WARN behavior.
